name: KB Home
description: KB Home is one of the largest and most recognized homebuilders in the United States, operating in numerous states across the country. The company focuses on building new homes for first-time, move-up, and active adult homebuyers. Known for its Built to Order approach, KB Home allows customers to personalize their homes through its design studios, emphasizing energy efficiency, sustainability, and quality construction. The company also provides mortgage services through its subsidiary, KBHS Home Loans, to support the homebuying journey.
